# Suman Regmi

> Full Stack Web Developer specializing in React, Django, and Laravel. This site is a personal portfolio: professional experience, project case studies, technical skills, and reference command sheets for common dev stacks.

Live site: https://www.sumanr.com.np
Contact: helpmeforhelp@gmail.com
GitHub: https://github.com/SumaniqueCode
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/suman-regmi-0b2440244/

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.sumanr.com.np/home): Landing page — hero introduction, About Me, Technical Skills, Featured Projects, Professional Experience, and Contact sections.
- [Projects](https://www.sumanr.com.np/projects): Full list of all portfolio projects with descriptions, tech stacks, and links.
- [Commands](https://www.sumanr.com.np/commands): Quick-reference command sheets for Git/GitHub, Laravel, Django, and React.js.

## Projects

- [GoretoX](https://www.sumanr.com.np/project/1) — https://goretox.com/ — Microservice-based EdTech platform built with React, Django, Tailwind CSS, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Stripe.
- [Workhub](https://www.sumanr.com.np/project/2) — https://github.com/SumaniqueCode/WorkHub — Nepal-focused job portal with AI-driven job recommendations, built with Django, React, PostgreSQL.
- [Share Insight Nepal](https://www.sumanr.com.np/project/3) — https://shareinsightnepal.up.railway.app — Stock market portfolio management app built with Laravel, PHP, Tailwind, MySQL.
- [Daily Repo](https://www.sumanr.com.np/project/4) — https://github.com/SumaniqueCode/Daily-report-react-laravel — Team daily task/reporting system built with React, TypeScript, Redux, Laravel.
- [Skill Karma](https://www.sumanr.com.np/project/6) — https://github.com/SumaniqueCode/skill-karma — Time-based skill exchange platform built with MongoDB, Express, React, Node.
- [Sanno Kaam](https://www.sumanr.com.np/project/7) — https://github.com/SumaniqueCode/saanokaam — Nepal-focused micro job/freelance platform built with Django, React.
- [Pathshala BMS](https://www.sumanr.com.np/project/8) — https://github.com/SumaniqueCode/pathshalaTMS — Blog management system built with Django, Tailwind, PostgreSQL.
- [Pathshala TMS](https://www.sumanr.com.np/project/9) — https://github.com/SumaniqueCode/pathshalaTMS — Task management system built with Django, Tailwind.
- [CC Hub](https://www.sumanr.com.np/project/10) — https://github.com/SumaniqueCode/skill-karma — Multivendor e-commerce platform for computer components, built with Laravel, PHP, MySQL.

## Skills

React, Redux, TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, MUI, Bootstrap, Laravel, Django, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Firebase, Git & GitHub, Python, Java, CI/CD, UI/UX, Figma, Adobe Creative Suite.

## Notes for automated agents

- This site is a client-rendered React (Vite) SPA; all page content is reachable via the routes above.
- robots.txt explicitly allows AI/LLM crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, CCBot, etc.).
- Project "code" and "live demo" links that point to `#` mean that particular link isn't available for that project (private repo, offline demo, etc.) — this is intentional, not a broken link.
